text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sis? What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I hear you broke the monthly record in<n>your last
scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What matters is whether you win or lose.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, nonsense. Numbers provide us<n>with
evidence of our growth in a simple<n>to understand
format.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And for those who wish to beat your<n>record,
having a concrete time will prove<n>helpful.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If you truly want a worthy opponent, you<n>should
keep breaking records.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
By the way, all those numbers in your<n>noggin?
They're the reason your head's<n>so big.
